title: Artifact-sensitive resting EEG candidate signals in public traumatic brain injury datasets: an OpenNeuro falsification analysis
description: Sanitized code and derived-artifact release for a null-leaning, artifact-sensitive OpenNeuro EEG falsification analysis in public TBI datasets.

creators.name: Pierpoint, Gregory
creators.affiliation: Macon & Joan Brock Virginia Health Sciences Eastern Virginia Medical School at Old Dominion University, Norfolk, VA, USA
